scripts.dev:example: pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-contracts build && pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-client build && pnpm --parallel --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-runtime --filter @kiri_ikki/example-nextjs dev
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-contracts build && pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-client build && pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-react build && pnpm --recursive lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-contracts build && pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-client build && pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-react build && pnpm --recursive test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-contracts build && pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-client build && pnpm --filter @kiri_ikki/thread-react build && pnpm --recursive typecheck
